name: Apple-Walnut Cake Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together whole wheat flour, wheat germ, baking soda, cinnamon, salt, and nutmeg. Set aside.
2. In a large bowl, combine diced apples, granulated sugar, oil, chopped walnuts, beaten eggs, and vanilla extract. Add the flour mixture to the wet ingredients and stir gently until combined.
3. Pour the batter into an ungreased 13x9 inch pan, spreading it evenly.
4. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
5. Allow to cool in the pan on a rack for about 10 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
6. If desired, sprinkle with powdered sugar before cutting into 12 bars.
